completed_tasks.name: Implement hermes_core.py with llama.cpp integration and RAG
Implement auto-skills SQLite tables, manager, and generator
Develop and build llama.cpp for Qwen 3.6

decisions.decision: Used Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (Q3_K_M) with --gpu-layers 20 for VRAM stability
decisions.rationale: --gpu-layers 50 caused CUDA invalid argument error. 20 layers fits comfortably in 22GB VRAM (7.6GB model + 0.7GB KV/context).

decisions.decision: Added keyword-based intent classification as fast path
decisions.rationale: Qwen 3.6 thinking mode consumes tokens before content output, making small max_tokens LLM classification unreliable. Keywords provide instant classification with LLM fallback.

decisions.decision: Fixed HIS query from non-existent 'patients' table to clinic_info + clinic_daily_log
decisions.rationale: Database has clinic_info (with staff_count, num_beds, specialties) and clinic_daily_log tables. patients table never created.

decisions.decision: Added DeepSeek as cloud provider (deepseek-chat model)
decisions.rationale: DeepSeek API key was available. API is OpenAI-compatible. Model: deepseek-chat, base: https://api.deepseek.com/v1.

decisions.decision: Installed sqlite3 CLI v3.49.1 to ~/.local/bin (from sqlite.org binary)
decisions.rationale: libsqlite3-0 was installed but CLI tool missing. Downloaded prebuilt binary since sudo not available.

next_action: Proceed to Phase 5: Cloud Sync & Analytics. Start with SYNC-01: Bidirectional sync of patient data with doctor-toolbox.com.
context_notes: Phase 4 fully verified. llama-server (PID 67852) running on port 8081 with Qwen 3.6. Hermes agent chat works end-to-end (local LLM + cloud DeepSeek fallback). All 6 verify_phase4.sh checks pass. Cloud backend supports deepseek/openai/anthropic providers. DEEPSEEK_API_KEY configured in .env (not committed).
